### Post by TimeCo on 2010-02-27
hi im linux noob and tried to google it but i only come up microsoft fix guides

when  start up babas chess it runs fine until i open a game/pgn or try to analyse some thing the this  comes up 

runtime error 
c:/program files/babschess/babschess.exe 
r6025 
- pure vital function call

i all ready add the gdiplus.dll file and i use the linux friendly download of babaschess from whinehq link --> [http://appdb.winehq.org/appview.php?appId=1716](http://appdb.winehq.org/appview.php?appId=1716)

im sry i dont know how to find what version of wine im using but im using on unbuntu 9.10 karmic kola amd thing 

also did all from this topic link --> [http://ubuntuforums.org/showthread.php?t=1405008](http://ubuntuforums.org/showthread.php?t=1405008)
